headline: Is Lam Research Corporation (LRCX) Eyeing Besi Industries Merger amid IBM Pact for Logic Scaling
summary: Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) is one of the best forever stocks to buy now. On March 12, Reuters reported that Lam Research Corp (NASDAQ:LRCX) is one of the suitors eyeing a potential deal to acquire BE Semiconductor Industries. The report also indicated that Besi has already engaged the services of investment bank Morgan Stanley, as […]
